title: Home
text:
Statistics & Data Science Student at UCLA
I’m a UCLA student interested in data analysis, machine learning, and using data to solve real-world problems. My work focuses on building clear, useful insights from messy datasets, with experience in Python, R, SQL, Tableau, and statistical modeling.
View My Projects Resume & Contact

title: Home
text:
Quick Introduction
Welcome to my personal website. This site highlights my background, projects, and interests as I continue building my experience in statistics, data science, and analytical problem-solving. I created this website to share my work with employers, collaborators, and anyone interested in learning more about what I do.



Professional headshot

title: About
text:
I am a Statistics & Data Science student at UCLA with a strong interest in using data to uncover meaningful patterns, communicate insights clearly, and support decision-making. I enjoy working on projects that combine technical analysis with real-world relevance.
My academic background has given me experience with statistical modeling, regression, machine learning, data cleaning, visualization, and interpreting results for different audiences. I am especially interested in projects where data can be used to better understand behavior, trends, and outcomes.


University of California, Los Angeles (UCLA)
B.S. in Statistics & Data Science
Expected Graduation: Month Year
Relevant Coursework - Regression Analysis - Machine Learning / Data Analysis - Statistical Computing - Data Visualization - Linear Algebra - Probability / Mathematical Statistics



I’m especially interested in: - data analysis for real-world decision-making - machine learning and predictive modeling - data visualization and communication - interdisciplinary projects connecting data with social, business, or public issues



You can add 2–3 lines here about leadership, student orgs, workshops, or broader interests. For example:
I’ve also enjoyed working in collaborative team settings, presenting findings, and helping others learn technical tools. I value projects that are both analytically strong and clearly communicated.

title: Projects
text:
Overview:
Built a multiple linear regression project in R to study how movie reviews and related features influenced box office revenue.
My Contribution:
Worked on data analysis, diagnostic plots, model interpretation, and presentation of findings.
Tools:
R, regression analysis, data visualization




Overview:
Developed a machine learning model in Python to classify penguin species using both numerical and categorical features.
My Contribution:
Helped preprocess the data, build the model, and evaluate predictive performance.
Tools:
Python, pandas, machine learning




Overview:
Created a Tableau-based group project analyzing dating profile data to identify trends and patterns in self-presentation.
My Contribution:
Contributed to analysis, visualization design, and communicating results in a presentation.
Tools:
Tableau, data visualization, exploratory data analysis




For each project, use this format:


Overview:
1–2 sentences explaining the problem or goal.
My Contribution:
